content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Youmay|the [[In-universe|out-of-universe]] year|the [[Jet|clone commander]]}}
[[File:Tojkotor1cover.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Tales of the Jedi 1|''Tales of the Jedi'' 1]] was published in 1993.]]

A list of events in '''1993''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars 6|''Classic Star Wars'' 6]] published.
*[[January 23|23]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted in mass market paperback format.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 18|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 18]] published.

==February==
[[File:ZettJukassa-SS.png|thumb|right|180px|[[Jett Lucas]] was born on [[February 17]], 1993]]
*[[February 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 7|''Classic Star Wars'' 7]] published.
*[[February 15|15]] – [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] published.
*[[February 17|17]] – [[Jett Lucas]] is born.
*[[February 26|26]] – [[Jake Bartok]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing]]'' released.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' published.
*[[March 11|11]] – [[Jodie Comer]] is born.
*[[March 15|15]] – ''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – [[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']] published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars 8|''Classic Star Wars'' 8]] published.
*[[April 27|27]] – ''[[George Lucas' Super Live Adventure]]'' premieres in Japan.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]'' published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[The Last Command]]'' published.
*01 – [[Star Wars: Dark Empire (TPB)|''Dark Empire'' trade paperback]] published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars 9|''Classic Star Wars'' 9]] published.
*[[May 13|13]] – ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 10|''Classic Star Wars'' 10]] published.
*01 – ''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Super Star Wars Official Game Secrets]]'' published.
*[[June 12|12]] – [[Greg Auer]] dies.
*[[June 15|15]] – ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' published.
*[[June 19|19]] – [[Twin Stars of Kira (West End Games)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] published
*?? – ''[[Supernova (WEG)]]'' published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 11|''Classic Star Wars'' 11]] published.

==August==
*[[August 8|08]] – [[Mickey Morton]] dies.
*[[August 16|16]] – [[Jeff Manning]] is born.
*16 – [[Cameron Monaghan]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 12|''Classic Star Wars'' 12]] published.
*01 – ''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]'' published.
*[[September 7|07]] – [[Taylor Gray]] is born.
*[[September 30|30]] – ''[[Jedi Dawn]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 1|''Tales of the Jedi'' 1]] published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars 13|''Classic Star Wars'' 13]] published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' hardcover published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars 14|''Classic Star Wars'' 14]] published.
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 2|''Tales of the Jedi'' 2]] published.
*[[November 23|23]] – ''[[Star Wars Trilogy: The Original Soundtrack Anthology]]'' released.
*?? – ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]'' released.
*?? – ''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' released.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]] published.
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 15|''Classic Star Wars'' 15]] published.
*[[December 19|19]] – [[Hermione Corfield]] is born.

==Unknown==
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Chess]]'' released.<ref>{{GameSpot|url=star-wars-chess|text=Star Wars Chess - GameSpot}}</ref>
*?? – ''[[The Farlander Papers]]'' companion book released.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 19|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 19]] published in Summer.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 20|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 20]] published in Fall.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles (Second Edition)]]'' published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – [[Eileen Baker]] dies.

==Notes and references==
